support_evidence: Minomura was also the bakushi to first produce photo books in Japan featuring kinbaku. His book, Beautifully Bound, also known as “the black book” and his 1952 collection of drawings, stand as two of the most sought after and valuable works for collectors of kinbaku books and art.
